nodes.label: Convert NotebookLM quiz JSON files into CryptoEx question bank format.  Usage:
Classify a question into one or more topics based on keyword matching.
Generate a stable, unique question ID.
Build a solution text from option rationales and hint.
Split text into blocks separated by one or more blank lines.
L1 - Basic Number Theory, Groups and Finite Fields
L3 - Hill Cipher, Stream Ciphers and OTP
L4 - Block Ciphers, DES and AES
L7 - Number Theory for Public-Key Crypto
L8 - Public Key Cryptography and RSA
L9 - Discrete Log Public Key Cryptosystems
L15 - Email Security and Secure Messaging
Rationale: Separate localStorage Key for Learn
Rationale: Static JSON for Study Content
Rationale: Keyword Overlap for Question-Study Linking
